Added five new variables to RX line file: DSPNSNG_FEE_PD_AMT, INGRDNT_CST_BILLED_AMT, INGRDNT_CST_PD_AMT, PROFNL_SRVC_FEE_BILLED_AMT, and PROFNL_SRVC_FEE_PD_AMT.

44835 OT line Added new variables LINE_PRCDR_CCS_CTGRY_CD and SRVC_PRVDR_NPPES_TXNMY_CD to the OT line file.
